name: public_safety_workplace_injury_spike_southport_tru_loy
premise: A Public Safety operations center is in a fast-moving incident involving public safety workplace injury spike southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases life safety, public trust, and proportional action. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Amina Petrov
agents.identity: I am Amina Petrov, accountable for a defensible call in Public Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Darius Mensah
agents.identity: I am Darius Mensah, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Amina Petrov must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Amina Petrov do?
